name: agent-ops
description: Operational helper skills for repository docs, notes, plans, and prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent work documented and portable.
interface.longDescription: Agent Ops packages practical operating skills for creating AGENTS.md files, refreshing READMEs, saving local notes and plans, and drafting copy-ready prompts.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Ops to document a repo, save a note or plan, or draft a prompt.
